content.scenarioHint: 场景提示：用户通常在寻求信息或服务时先提问，例如向经理汇报进展
expectedAnswers: Hey boss, got a minute to discuss the Q2 project?
Hi, do you have a minute to talk about the Q2 progress?
Hey, can we quickly discuss the Q2 project?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯

content.speakerText: Good morning, Lisa. Do you have a moment to go over the Q3 forecast?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，丽莎。你有空讨论一下Q3预测吗？
expectedAnswers: Of course. I've got the updated numbers ready.
Yes, absolutely — I've prepared the slides and highlighted the main trends.
Sure thing. I've reviewed all the projections and can walk you through the assumptions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并表达准备就绪
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词和时态
表达自然度：是否避免生硬或过于正式的表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 prepared / updated / reviewed / walkthrough 等职场关键词

content.speakerText: Hi Jordan, can we quickly sync on the Q2 results?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，乔丹，我们能快速同步一下Q2的结果吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! I've pulled all the reports and key insights.
Absolutely — I've organized everything and can start anytime.
Of course. I've summarized the highlights and am ready to discuss.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否立即响应并表明可立即开始
语言准确性：动词使用是否恰当（pull, organize, summarize）
表达自然度：是否使用口语化但专业的表达方式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 pulled / organized / summarized / ready 等核心词汇
